title: Scheduled report emails not sending
body: Multiple enterprise customers reporting they did not receive their Monday morning scheduled reports. Issue started at 06:00 UTC. Sendgrid dashboard shows queued but not delivered.

comments.author: eng-oncall
comments.body: Root cause: Sendgrid API key rotated by security team at 05:45 UTC without updating the mailer service config. Fix deployed at 08:40 UTC. All queued emails delivered.
